## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally (`pytest -m "not integration"`)
- [ ] `make lint` passes (ruff)
- [ ] `make types` passes (mypy)
- [ ] New functionality is covered by tests
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or local paths committed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If touching the OLS client: integration test added or updated
